contract.goal: 让 OpenNori 自身形成成熟开源库和官方 SDK 优先的 build-vs-buy 工程习惯：通用基础设施在实现前必须评估当前项目依赖、标准库、官方 SDK、成熟开源库；只有许可证、维护性、安全、包体积、性能或产品边界不满足时才允许最小自研。

acceptance_basis.summary: User approved downgrading this loop to needs-user-review because build-vs-buy evaluation must be discussed with Jarl before it can count as complete.

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我让 agent 用 OpenNori 推进 OpenNori 自身的通用基础设施改动时，能在 status、check、doctor 或 report 中看到 build-vs-buy 健康状态，而不是只看到 agent 说已经考虑过复用。
criteria.measurement: 用户让 agent 运行 opennori status、opennori check、opennori doctor 或 opennori report，并查看 Architecture / build-vs-buy 区域。
criteria.threshold: 输出显示 build-vs-buy 是 clear、needs-action 或 broken；如果某个基础设施决策缺少当前项目、标准库、官方 SDK、成熟开源库或自研理由，用户能看到具体 decision、问题和恢复动作。

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我查看 OpenNori 自身的架构决策时，能复查每个通用产品基础能力是否优先评估了可复用方案，而不是把用户入口、项目状态、可编辑文档和安装升级卸载体验默认手写。
criteria.measurement: 用户打开 .opennori/architecture/decisions 下的 build-vs-buy 决策，或查看 opennori architecture show / report 输出。
criteria.threshold: 与通用产品基础能力相关的决策记录包含 current project、standard library、official SDK、open source candidates、recommendation；recommendation 为 self-build 时还必须说明许可证、维护性、安全、包体积、性能或产品边界理由。

criteria.user_story: 作为用户，我查看 OpenNori 自身当前报告时，能判断它哪些地方已经复用了标准库或成熟库、哪些地方仍保留最小自研，以及这些自研是否属于 OpenNori 产品语义而不是通用基础设施。
criteria.measurement: 用户查看 opennori report、architecture show、package.json 和相关 build-vs-buy evidence。
criteria.threshold: 报告和证据能区分复用、最小自研和待处理风险；如果 schema、Markdown 或 CLI 仍手写过重但没有充分决策证据，目标不能被判断为 complete。

evidence.summary: OpenNori now exposes build-vs-buy health as architecture.build_vs_buy in status/check/report/architecture show and as a doctor check named build_vs_buy_health; missing candidate fields or self-build reasons produce warnings and recovery actions.

sources.label: node --test --test-name-pattern 'architecture baseline loop|build-vs-buy health|context export' test/core.test.js
sources.command: node --test --test-name-pattern 'architecture baseline loop|build-vs-buy health|context export' test/core.test.js

evidence.reviewability: Run the listed targeted tests, then inspect architecture.build_vs_buy.status/findings and doctor check build_vs_buy_health.
evidence.limitations: This verifies OpenNori-owned health reporting; it does not mean every future infrastructure area has already been migrated to an external library. This was produced before joint user-agent build-vs-buy evaluation and must not be treated as completion evidence.

evidence.summary: Needs joint user-agent evaluation: the existing build-vs-buy notes are draft evidence from the agent, but Jarl has not yet reviewed the candidates, self-build boundaries, or final recommendation.

sources.label: User correction: build-vs-buy should be discussed and evaluated together before completion.

evidence.reviewability: Continue the conversation with Jarl, compare candidate libraries and self-build boundaries, then record a new decision or waiver after explicit agreement.
evidence.limitations: The current decision files and code changes are draft material until the joint evaluation is complete.

evidence.summary: OpenNori status/check/doctor/report now expose build-vs-buy health as clear, needs-action, or broken; missing candidate fields and self-build reasons surface as build_vs_buy warnings and doctor recovery actions, while superseded historical decisions remain reviewable without counting as current health.
evidence.reviewability: Run npm run check, then inspect architecture.build_vs_buy in status/check/report and doctor check build_vs_buy_health; the test suite includes missing-field and superseded-decision regressions.
evidence.limitations: This verifies the build-vs-buy health surface and current OpenNori self decisions; it does not mean every future infrastructure area is already migrated.

evidence.summary: OpenNori self decisions now record reviewable candidates for protocol-state validation, editable Markdown parsing, and CLI subcommand surface, including current project state, Node standard library boundaries, official SDK applicability, mature MIT npm candidates, and self-build limits where applicable.

sources.label: npm view ajv zod valibot micromark commander citty cac version license description repository.url --json
sources.command: npm view ajv zod valibot micromark commander citty cac version license description repository.url --json

evidence.reviewability: Open the listed decision files and verify each includes current_project, standard_library, official_sdk, open_source, recommendation, and self_build_reason when recommendation is self-build.
evidence.limitations: The npm candidate versions are a point-in-time check on 2026-06-12 and should be refreshed before adding dependencies. This was produced before joint user-agent build-vs-buy evaluation and must not be treated as completion evidence.

evidence.summary: Needs joint user-agent evaluation: the existing build-vs-buy notes are draft evidence from the agent, but Jarl has not yet reviewed the candidates, self-build boundaries, or final recommendation.

evidence.reviewability: Continue the conversation with Jarl, compare candidate libraries and self-build boundaries, then record a new decision or waiver after explicit agreement.
evidence.limitations: The current decision files and code changes are draft material until the joint evaluation is complete.

evidence.summary: OpenNori self architecture decisions now include active reusable-library decisions for citty, JSON Schema/Ajv, yaml frontmatter, and directory-based Skill Pack assets; obsolete parseArgs and JS-string Skill decisions are explicitly marked superseded rather than silently treated as current architecture.

sources.label: .opennori/architecture/decisions/skill-pack-将-opennori-skill-pack-从-cli-入口拆到独立产品面模块.json
sources.path: .opennori/architecture/decisions/skill-pack-将-opennori-skill-pack-从-cli-入口拆到独立产品面模块.json

evidence.reviewability: Open architecture show output or the listed decision JSON files and verify current_project, standard_library, official_sdk, open_source, recommendation, status, superseded_by, and self_build_reason where applicable.
evidence.limitations: Some active decisions intentionally keep OpenNori product-domain semantics local; the current CLI implementation is still an incremental migration, not a completed citty rewrite.

evidence.summary: OpenNori report/status now separate reused standard library choices from minimal self-build product semantics: parseArgs is reused for CLI tokenization, schema validation has Ajv/Zod/Valibot candidates recorded for growth, Markdown parsing is explicitly limited to generated-table recovery, and product-domain audits remain local with self-build reasons.
evidence.reviewability: Review status/report architecture.build_vs_buy plus package.json and the decision directory.
evidence.limitations: The implementation still has a growing src/cli.js; the recorded CLI framework decision says to re-evaluate commander/citty/cac if subcommand routing keeps expanding. This was produced before joint user-agent build-vs-buy evaluation and must not be treated as completion evidence.

evidence.summary: Needs joint user-agent evaluation: the existing build-vs-buy notes are draft evidence from the agent, but Jarl has not yet reviewed the candidates, self-build boundaries, or final recommendation.

evidence.reviewability: Continue the conversation with Jarl, compare candidate libraries and self-build boundaries, then record a new decision or waiver after explicit agreement.
evidence.limitations: The current decision files and code changes are draft material until the joint evaluation is complete.

evidence.summary: OpenNori report/status now let a user distinguish active reuse decisions, superseded historical decisions, and minimal self-build product glue; Skill Pack source of truth has moved to skills/*/SKILL.md, package dependencies now include citty/Ajv/yaml/Clack, and build-vs-buy health reports 9 active decisions plus 3 superseded decisions with no findings.
evidence.reviewability: Run report and architecture show, then inspect package.json, src/skills.js, skills/*/SKILL.md, and the generated report to verify active/superseded/self-build distinctions.
evidence.limitations: This slice fixes Skill Pack asset architecture and build-vs-buy reporting; the later TypeScript/citty command-module migration and public JSON Schema validation are still future implementation slices.
